How it works

Getting started is simple.

Four steps stand between you and the speaking confidence you've always wanted.

1

Join the Club

Sign up in less than 5 minutes and get instant access.

سجلي وابدئي مباشرة

2

Grow Your Vocabulary

Daily flash cards designed to help you remember words naturally.

غذي مفرداتك يومياً بدون ضغط أو حفظ ممل

3

Join Live Sessions

Live speaking sessions available up to 4 hours daily — join whenever suits you.

ادخلي اللقاءات المباشرة في الوقت اللي يناسبك

4

Practice with Confidence

Speak with supportive teachers in a relaxed, low-pressure environment.

مارسي اللغة مع معلمات بتوتر أقل.. وحماس أكبر

Why Hala Hi Works

Most learners don't struggle with understanding English.

They struggle with speaking it. Hala Hi focuses on what really builds fluency:

  • Real conversations, not memorised scripts
  • A supportive, judgment-free environment
  • Practice without pressure — every single day

لأن الثقة تبنى لما تبدئين تتكلمين..

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Not at all. If you understand basic English and want to improve your speaking, you're ready to join.

مو لازم تكونين ممتازة — المهم عندك أساس بسيط ورغبة تتكلمين

Yes! Hala Hi was created especially for learners who feel nervous or unsure when speaking.

البيئة داعمة ومريحة بدون ضغط

Each day, we open speaking sessions for up to 4 hours with English teachers. We usually start with a simple topic, then you're placed in small groups (3–4 learners) to speak naturally. Afterwards, everyone comes back together to share ideas — in a relaxed way, without pressure or heavy correction.

Mistakes are welcome here. They are a natural part of learning and growth. 🤍

Hala Hi is a speaking club focused on practice, not traditional lessons. You won't sit through lectures — you'll actually speak.

Most learners start noticing a difference within a few weeks of consistent practice. The more you speak, the faster you grow — because you start noticing your gaps in real time. In short: speak more, grow faster. 🌱
